name: Kevin
css: .kb-wrap { width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #000010; } .kb-text { font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace; font-size: clamp(2rem, 10vw, 5rem); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #00cfff; text-shadow: 0 0 8px #00cfff, 0 0 20px #00cfff, 0 0 40px #0080ff, 0 0 80px #0040ff, 0 0 120px #0020cc; animation: kb-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes kb-pulse { 0%, 100% { text-shadow: 0 0 8px #00cfff, 0 0 20px #00cfff, 0 0 40px #0080ff, 0 0 80px #0040ff, 0 0 120px #0020cc; opacity: 1; } 50% { text-shadow: 0 0 4px #00cfff, 0 0 10px #00cfff, 0 0 20px #0080ff, 0 0 40px #0040ff, 0 0 60px #0020cc; opacity: 0.8; } }
